samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="state" type="sequential_logic">Current state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="next_state" type="sequential_logic">Next state of the FSM.</reg>
        <reg id="match_reg" type="sequential_logic">Register to store the MATCH output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always description="Sequential logic block triggered on the positive edge of CLK or the negative edge of RST">
                <if description="Reset condition">
                    <condition description="RST is active">
                        <true>
                            <assign description="Reset the state to S0">state = S0;</assign>
                            <assign description="Reset the MATCH output to 0">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </if>
                <else description="If RST is not active">
                    <true>
                        <assign description="Update the state to the next state">state = next_state;</assign>
                    </true>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always description="Combinational logic block triggered on the change of IN or state">
                <if description="Input condition">
                    <condition description="IN is 1">
                        <true>
                            <case description="Case statement based on the current state">
                                <condition description="State S0">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S1">next_state = S1;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S1">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S2;">next_state = S2;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S2">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S3;">next_state = S3;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S3">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S4;">next_state = S4;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S4">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S1;">next_state = S1;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 1;">match_reg = 1;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S1">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S2;">next_state = S2;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S2">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S3;">next_state = S3;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S3">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S4;">next_state = S4;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S4">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S1;">next_state = S1;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                            </case>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                    <else description="If IN is not 1">
                        <true>
                            <case description="Case statement based on the current state">
                                <condition description="State S0">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S0;">next_state = S0;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S1">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S0;">next_state = S0;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S2">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S0;">next_state = S0;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S3">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S0;">next_state = S0;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                                <condition description="State S4">
                                    <true>
                                        <assign description="Update the next state to S0;">next_state = S0;</assign>
                                        <assign description="Update the MATCH output to 0;">match_reg = 0;</assign>
                                    </true>
                                </condition>
                            </case>
                        </true>
                    </else>
                </if>
            </always>
        </combinational_logic>
        <assign description="Assign MATCH output to match_reg">MATCH = match_reg;</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
